pr.title: Melee decomp: Item collision and projectile matches
pr.author: fjooord

summary: PR #2690 was an item-subsystem implementation-only matching slice. It changed four item collision/projectile source files and reported 9 new exact matches plus 1 improved unmatched function, with zero broken, fuzzy, or metric regressions in the supplied verification report.

what_changed: Reported 9 newly exact matched functions across four item subsystem source files.

In itcoll.c, rewrote portions of item-hit/item-hurt collision handling in it_802706D0, including inlining formerly helper-shaped hitbox filtering/collision logic, adding a separate hurt_index loop variable, and adjusting PAD_STACK from 8 to 12.

In itcoll.c, improved it_80270E30 by renaming temp-style locals to role names such as damage_log, knockback, max_knockback, knockback_cap, and hurt_pos; collapsed intermediate arithmetic into expressions; and used explicit UNUSED locals for stack/codegen shape.
In itcoll.c, cleaned ECB overlap users by using an ecb local, direct Item_804A0CCC array access, and ABS(sp24.x - x_pos) / ABS(sp34.x - sp28.x) instead of hand-written absolute-value temporaries.
In itarwinglaser.c, moved z lifetime to the enclosing function scope, collapsed spawn.prev_pos/spawn.pos assignment, and simplified z sign handling in it_802E72E0.

In itkyasarin.c, introduced small static inline helpers for collision position setup and CollData access, passed an external Vec3 scratch pointer into itKyasarin_FlipAndFall, and reduced PAD_STACK in it_802EDDC0.
In itsamusgrapple.c, the loaded diff is truncated, but metadata and bot report show changes producing exact matches for three Samus grapple functions.
Verification text reports clean isolated slice verification, clean full ship-set regression report, git diff --check pass, and review_lint with 0 errors and 112 warnings.
smart_moves: Kept the slice item-subsystem-local with no header/naming churn claimed in the PR body.
Used role-based local names in it_80270E30 where the local purpose is visible from nearby code, while leaving address-style function names unchanged.
Used the existing ABS macro for x-distance comparisons instead of retaining manual absolute-value branches.
Introduced narrow static inline helpers in itkyasarin.c to express repeated collision-position setup without broad type or header changes.
Preserved verification evidence in the PR body, including the exact build command, baseline, regression counts, diff check, and review_lint result.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item collision matching, replacing temp_rXX/var_fXX locals with role-specific names can improve reviewability while still matching when the underlying expression shape and local lifetimes are preserved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_80270E30 renames var_r29 to damage_log, var_f27 to knockback, var_f28 to max_knockback, temp_f0 to knockback_cap
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: it_80270E30 improved from 97.82% to 98.80%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a generated absolute-value branch represents a simple magnitude test, the project ABS macro can be a viable matching/readability form.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_80271D2C replaces x_float/x_float_mag branch with ABS(sp34.x - sp28.x) < 0.001f
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: it_80271D2C became 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small static inline helpers may be useful for matching when they isolate repeated setup such as assigning CollData cur_pos and a Vec3 scratch position, but this remains file-local evidence rather than a global style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: itkyasarin.c adds itKyasarin_SetFallCollPos and itKyasarin_GetCollData
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: it_802EDDC0 became 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: PAD_STACK changes are acceptable evidence-backed matching tactics only when narrow and paired with regression evidence; this PR changed PAD_STACK in it_802706D0 and it_802EDDC0 and supplied a clean regression report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_802706D0 PAD_STACK(8) to PAD_STACK(12)
raw_diff excerpt: it_802EDDC0 PAD_STACK(32) to PAD_STACK(4)
human_pr_text.md Verification: slice regression report 9 new matches, 0 broken, 0 fuzzy, 0 metric regressions

naming_conventions.convention: Use clear local role names when semantics are directly visible: damage_log for DamageLogEntry pointer, hurt_pos for a copied hurt collision position, knockback/max_knockback/knockback_cap for knockback calculations, ecb for itECB pointer, and hurt_index for hurtbox loop index.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_80270E30 local renames
raw_diff excerpt: it_80271B60 ecb local
raw_diff excerpt: it_802706D0 hurt_index loop

naming_conventions.convention: Keep unresolved global/function names address-style when the PR does not provide stronger semantic evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: functions such as it_802706D0, it_80270E30, it_802E72E0, it_802EDDC0 remain address-style
human_pr_text.md: Header/naming churn: none

naming_conventions.convention: Mark retained stack-shaping locals with UNUSED rather than leaving misleading temp names when the variables are intentionally unused.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_80270E30 introduces UNUSED f32 unused_float0..unused_float4 and UNUSED s32 unused_int0..unused_int1
raw_diff excerpt: it_80271B60 introduces UNUSED Item_FtTrack* unused_ft_track

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted declaration order and local lifetimes in several functions, including moving f32 z to function scope in it_802E72E0 and separating declarations from assignments in itColl_chkECBOverlap.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: itarwinglaser.c adds f32 z near top of it_802E72E0
raw_diff excerpt: itColl_chkECBOverlap splits top/left/right/bottom declarations from assignments

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK narrowly to steer stack layout in exact-match functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: it_802706D0 PAD_STACK(12)
raw_diff excerpt: it_802EDDC0 PAD_STACK(4)
human_pr_text.md Verification: zero reported slice regressions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Expanded/inlined collision helper logic inside it_802706D0 rather than preserving the former call shape to it_802706D0_sub2 / it_802706D0_sub in the shown path.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: count calculation loop replaces count = it_802706D0_sub2(item, arg_item)
raw_diff excerpt: conditional block replaces combined it_802706D0_sub(...) continue condition

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used pointer iteration over it_804A0E70 via damage_log++ in it_80270E30 while tracking index separately.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: damage_log = it_804A0E70; hit = damage_log->x8; damage_log++

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Collapsed chained struct assignment for SpawnItem position fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff excerpt: spawn.prev_pos = spawn.pos = sp24 in it_802E72E0

accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2690 changed PAD_STACK values in it_802706D0 and it_802EDDC0 and supplied slice/full-set regression evidence with zero broken, fuzzy, or metric regressions. Treat this as a narrow tactic record, not a broad style preference.
